tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive aborted with exit code 1. Last line of stderr: 'init.sh: line 1577: TEST_INTERVAL: unbound variable'. The script ran far enough to clone the framework, install CDF, write phase-state.json and orchestrator-source.json, then crashed on the build-progress.json heredoc because TEST_INTERVAL is only assigned in discover_project_context() (line 494) which the non-interactive path bypasses. set -u then aborts the script before CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, ci.yml, release.yml, build-progress.json, process-state.json, tool-preferences.json, settings.local.json, and the pre-commit hook are written.

tests.name: claude_md_created
tests.details: CLAUDE.md missing after init. Cause: init.sh aborted at TEST_INTERVAL unbound variable before generate_claude_md was called.

tests.name: project_intake_created
tests.details: PROJECT_INTAKE.md present (29160 bytes); Section 1 was pre-filled before the abort point.

tests.name: approval_log_created
tests.details: APPROVAL_LOG.md missing after init. verify-install.sh auto-fixed it but init itself did not produce it. Same cause as CLAUDE.md.

tests.name: gitignore_created
tests.details: .gitignore missing after init. verify-install.sh auto-fixed it. Same cause.

tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh present (PR #17 / U-H fix holds).

tests.details: Running init.sh --non-interactive from $FRAMEWORK exits with code 1 and prints '[FAIL] Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo.' (PR #18 fix holds).

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh --non-interactive crashes on unbound TEST_INTERVAL before generating core files
framework_bugs.reproduction: WORKDIR=$(mktemp -d); cd $WORKDIR; bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project p --description 'x' --platform desktop --track full --deployment personal --language rust --project-dir $WORKDIR/p --git-host github --visibility private --allow-existing-dir; echo $?
framework_bugs.expected: Exit code 0, with CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .github/workflows/release.yml, .claude/build-progress.json (populated), .claude/process-state.json, .claude/tool-preferences.json, .git/hooks/pre-commit all present.
framework_bugs.actual: Exit code 1. stderr: 'init.sh: line 1577: TEST_INTERVAL: unbound variable'. Root cause: TEST_INTERVAL=2 is assigned only in discover_project_context() at line 494, which is the interactive prompt function. The non-interactive code path (added in PR #19 / BL-016) does not initialize TEST_INTERVAL, and `set -u` at the top of init.sh aborts the script when the heredoc at line 1582 references $TEST_INTERVAL. Effect: build-progress.json, process-state.json, tool-preferences.json, qdrant settings.local.json, CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, ci.yml, release.yml, and the fallback pre-commit hook all fail to generate. This breaks every base-config UAT run that uses --non-interactive (i.e., the official driver per the runbook). Suggested fix: initialize TEST_INTERVAL=2 at the top of run_non_interactive (alongside the other defaults), or move the TEST_INTERVAL=2 assignment out of discover_project_context() and into a shared init block.

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh --help-non-interactive does not list TEST_INTERVAL or testing_interval as a configurable input, so users have no way to set it via flag/config; combined with the bug above, --non-interactive currently has no path to a working build-progress.json.
documentation_gaps.where: init.sh --help-non-interactive output / docs/builders-guide.md 'Scripted / Non-Interactive Project Initialization'

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exited 0 and created .claude/process-state.json with phase1_architecture.started_at populated. Note: init had not produced process-state.json (see Phase 0 bug); start-phase1 created it on the fly, which is why this still works.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is an array.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 steps (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via --complete-step. No artifact gates fire on phase1 steps in process-checklist.sh.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.' RC=0.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression: no script advances .current_phase after gate passes. .current_phase still 0 after all phase1 steps and gate pass. This was an open bug from the 2026-04-25 sweep; still not fixed.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After --start-phase1 and completing all 5 phase1_architecture steps, run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; gate reports consistent, but .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 0.
framework_bugs.expected: current_phase to advance to 1 (or some advance-phase script exists and is documented).
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays 0; no advance-phase script in scripts/. Same as U-D from 2026-04-25 sweep.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-feature uat-feat-1 set .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1'.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated) completed sequentially. Stub artifacts: src/uat_feat_1.rs, tests/uat_feat_1_test.rs, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md (Open=false, scan stubbed for UAT).

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 steps were marked complete.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with RC=0. .git/hooks/commit-msg is missing entirely; the only hook installed is .git/hooks/pre-commit. PreToolUse hooks only fire under Claude Code, so direct git invocation bypasses BL-006 in shell. This is the U-C bug from the prior sweep, still open.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 and --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, .build_loop reset to feature=null with empty steps_completed (auto-reset confirmed in process-state.json). Grace-window logic from PR #17 appears intact.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: After scripts/pending-approval.sh --offer 'Should we proceed?' --options 'yes:Yes proceed' 'no:No abort' --recommendation yes, piping a JSON PreToolUse payload into pre-commit-gate.sh produced permissionDecision=deny with the pending-approval message. PR #16 BL-015 sentinel reader works.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed .claude/pending-approval.json; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocations with the same payload returned no deny.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: FAIL — but for a different reason than expected. .claude/build-progress.json is 0 bytes (empty file) because init.sh aborted before the heredoc that writes its initial JSON. test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 reported success but did not create the file, so .features_completed cannot be queried. jq prints null. Root cause: same Phase 0 Critical bug (TEST_INTERVAL unbound).

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 (no commit-msg hook)
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked because no Build Loop is active for the feat: subject.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded RC=0. .git/hooks/commit-msg does not exist; only .git/hooks/pre-commit is installed. BL-006 enforcement is gated on PreToolUse, which means direct shell git use bypasses it entirely. Same as U-C from prior sweep.

framework_bugs.summary: U-K confirmation: test-gate.sh integer comparison on null/empty value
framework_bugs.reproduction: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 against a project where init aborted (build-progress.json is 0 bytes), scripts/test-gate.sh --record-feature emits 'test-gate.sh: line 122: [: : integer expression expected' to stderr. Also affects the success message which prints 'Feature uat-feat-1 recorded (/ until next test session)' with empty numerator/denominator.
framework_bugs.expected: Either populate the missing fields with sane defaults when build-progress.json is empty, OR refuse to operate and tell the user to repair via verify-install.sh.
framework_bugs.actual: Continues with `[: : integer expression expected` warning. Same as U-K from prior sweep.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-010 / U-C — direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006. Either install a commit-msg hook in install_precommit_hook OR document that BL-006 only fires when the agent issues commits via Claude Code's Bash tool.
documentation_gaps.where: .git/hooks/ generated by init.sh / docs/builders-guide.md BL-006 section

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Grep found matches only in templates/policy text under .claude/framework/hooks/known-stdlib.txt, evaluation-prompts/Projects/, and scripts/check-phase-gate.sh / check-versions.sh / validate.sh — all are policy/lint code, not actual credentials. No real secrets committed.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == 43ade857675fe54621b431cf09d060b6cb1ff955 (unchanged from setup). git status shows only the pre-existing untracked '.claude/' and 'Reports/uat-2026-04-26/' that were present before this agent started (the latter is the runbook + results sibling-agents are writing into; not framework code).

summary: Critical regression: init.sh --non-interactive crashes on unbound TEST_INTERVAL (line 1577) immediately before generating CLAUDE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, .gitignore, ci.yml, release.yml, build-progress.json, process-state.json, and the pre-commit hook — making PR #19's BL-016 driver unusable on the personal/desktop/full path. Confirmed still-open prior-sweep bugs U-C (BL-006 direct-shell bypass) and U-D (no current_phase advancement script) and U-K (test-gate.sh null integer cmp). PR #16 BL-015 sentinel, PR #17 U-H/grace-window fixes, and PR #18 framework-self-guard all hold.
